description: 10 - 23-12-2024 - Emails between Patricia Dreghorn (CEO, UK Security Vetting, CO) and others
text:
Re: Urgent vetting question

Patricia Dreghorn < PERSONAL > 23 December 2024 at 20:05
To: JCS < PERSONAL >
ce: JCS < PERSONAL >, Michael Roberts < PERSONAL S

Great thank you both.
Trish

Patricia Dreghorn

UKSV CEO

UKSV, Government Security Group (GSG)
Cabinet Office

= PERSONAL

M: PERSONAL

NSV Privacy Notice

On Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 18:59, JCS < PERSONAL > wrote:

Apologies the phone doesn't seem to be working, hopefully this finds you
JCS

_—— Forwarded message --------

lan Collard*< PERSONAL >
Date: Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 13:07

Subject: Re: Urgent vetting question

To JCS < PERSONAL >

ce: JCS < PERSONAL >, TomBramley< PERSONAL >
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Thanks JCS ,

I’ ve since spoken to Tom (this morning) and we will proceed with the clearance process. JCS _ is in touch with
the individual. We are grateful to GSG and UKSV for expediting the application once the paperwork comes in.

Best wishes,

lan

lan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: | PERSONAL

27

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: JCS PERSONAL >
Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 11:37:02 AM
To: lanCollad*< PERSONAL >

Subject: Re: Fw: Urgent vetting question

Thanks for sharing, | was aware of this matter and have been in email contact wih JCS this mornina. | take
it from your note that you are seeking confirmation as to the need for a DV, however, | understand that JCS has
set Lord Mandelson up on the system. If it is required then, once the application is completed and arrives with UKSV
we can progress. We have allocated a vetting officer who is ready to conduct the interview and the case is flagged to
be locked down to our Special Handling team to limit access.

| am working over the festive break and will be available as required to update you on progress.

many thanks

JCS

On Mon, 23 Dec 2024 at 11:14, lan Collard*< PERSONAL ~ > wrote:

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Per Michael's OOO message.
lan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: PERSONAL
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: lan Collard *

Sent: Monday, December 23, 2024 11:12:51 AM.
To: 4 NAL < PERSONAL >
Cc: Michael Roberts < PERSONAL > JCS

28


< PERSONAL >; Vita Maynard < PERSONAL >

Subject: Urgent vetting question
Michael, Vincent's team,

Gerard McGurk was in touch last week about the expected (now confirmed) appointment of Lord Peter Mandelson
as the next UK Ambassador to Washington.

The specific question was whether Lord M is exempt from a UKV process (specifically for DV clearance) as a
member of the House of Lords?

We think CO say he is exempt. But we want to double check given the policy around public appointments, and
whether that alters the calculation?

He plans to begin duties (though not his posting) in early Jan, so time is of the essence.

Best wishes,

lan Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office
King Charles Street | London | SW1A 2AH
Mobile/WhatsApp: PERSONAL

Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fedo

This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the Foreign, Commonwealth
& Development Office may be monitored in line with relevant UK legislation

JCS
Head of Partner Services
UKSV, Government Security Group
Cabinet Office
E PERSONAL
M: PERSUNAL,

NSV Privacy Notice

29
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
